summary: Full e2e testing of AXUM landing page. Backend (10/10 pytest passing) and frontend (all critical UI flows verified) work end-to-end. Hero slider arrows + counter, nav overlay open/close, product grid + category filtering (EVENING -> 3 items), dual-image hover cross-fade, lookbook tab switching, newsletter signup with valid email -> success state, duplicate email -> 409 + error toast 'Email already subscribed.' all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI startup/shutdown event handlers (@app.on_event) - consider migrating to lifespan context manager.
Newsletter API returns 200 (default) on POST; spec/REST convention suggests 201 Created for new resource creation. Not breaking but inconsistent.
HeroSlider auto-rotates every 6.5s which can race with user-driven prev/next - works fine, but consider pausing autoplay briefly after manual interaction for better UX.
Sonner Toaster includes its own DOM but inline error display when newsletter form already submitted is only via toast (no inline error state) - acceptable.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 products, 3 hero slides, 4 lookbook items on startup if empty. Newsletter test entries created with email pattern test_*@axumtest.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API base: https://axum-stark.preview.emergentagent.com/api. All endpoints (/, /products, /products?category=, /products/categories, /hero, /lookbook, /newsletter POST, /newsletter/count) verified working. data-testids present per spec. Newsletter form is replaced with success element on submit; for duplicate-email scenario you must reload the page or use a fresh session.
